title: SENTINEL APEX Zero-Day Advisory: NETSCALER
content:
Entity: NETSCALER
Alert Type: KEV Rapid Addition
Exploitation Status: CONFIRMED
Confidence: 0.95
Chain Evidence: kev_add
Recommended Actions:
